description.ko: 우주 심연의 어두운 품 속에서 천체 구조물들이 영원히 떠다니는 고요하고 장엄한 외부 공간을 탐험하세요.
description.en: Explore the silent majesty of the outer void, where celestial structures drift eternally in the dark embrace of the deep universe.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a massive obsidian monolith drifting through a swirling violet and deep black nebula, cosmic dust reflecting faint starlight, bioluminescent veins glowing on the structure, extreme depth of field, 8k resolution, photorealistic, ethereal atmosphere, sense of infinite scale.
